posts.author: angkan (Angie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We need to be able to require fields in the CRM version. Right now the suggestion is to use form entry but there are other issues when you do this (form not required on kanban view, form and enrichment can’t be used together, etc.) This functionality seems to be available in the project management version and we would benefit greatly by having this in the CRM also.

What are you trying to achieve

Improve usability and data quality.
